commands.notes: Fails due to pre-existing unrelated error in src/__mocks__/__tests__/vscode-mock.test.ts (workspace.createFileSystemWatcher signature mismatch).

commands.cmd: npx tsc --module commonjs --target ES2022 --moduleResolution node --esModuleInterop --types node --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-tests src/validation/lint-rules.ts src/validation/linter.ts src/validation/__tests__/linter.test.ts; node --test .tmp-tests/validation/__tests__/linter.test.js

verification.regression_notes: Added comprehensive unit coverage for WP001-WP013, lintAll, schema validation, cycle detection, orphan prompt detection, malformed JSON handling, and rule-disabling behavior.

handoff.summary: Implemented a full Workpack Protocol linter (WP001-WP013), schema-backed validation (meta/state/output), linter orchestration APIs, and VS Code diagnostics publishing with diagnostic collection lifecycle management.
next_steps: Wire WorkpackDiagnosticProvider into command execution or workspace watchers for automatic Problems panel refresh.
Optionally address the pre-existing TypeScript error in src/__mocks__/__tests__/vscode-mock.test.ts to restore global tsc gate.
Run full extension test matrix after integrating diagnostics trigger points.
known_issues: Global `npx tsc --noEmit` gate currently fails due to an unrelated pre-existing test typing issue outside validation scope.
